---
title: Annual General Meeting
---

## 2026 Agenda

1. Call to order
    - Welcome and introduction of board of directors
    - Overview of meeting and procedures
2. Review and approval meeting agenda
3. Approval of past AGM minutes
4. President’s report
    - Summary and highlights of past activities
    - Goals and upcoming initiatives
5. Committee reports
    - Talks/presentations
    - Outings
    - Communications
    - Organization
    - Treasurer’s report
    - Projected 2026 budget
6. Election of directors
    - Members at large
7. Adjournment
8. Nature walk
